ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Brand website URL */,
  "brand_social_media" TEXT /* Brand social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product line belongs to */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "product_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "product_line_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the product line */,
  "product_line_image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "size_standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "size_standard_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category */,
  "size_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "size_category_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard used */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "us_size_range" TEXT /* US size range for the size */,
  "knit_size_range" TEXT /* Knit size range for the size */,
  "size_us_measurement_range" TEXT /* US measurement range for the size */,
  "size_eu_measurement_range" TEXT /* EU measurement range for the size */,
  "size_uk_measurement_range" TEXT /* UK measurement range for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "bust_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for bust */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "waist_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for waist */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "hip_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for hip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_low_threshold" INTEGER /* Low inventory threshold for reordering */,
  "inventory_high_threshold" INTEGER /* High inventory threshold for reordering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, inventory specialist, customer service) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., product, inventory, user) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating (1-5) for the product */,
  "sizing_rating" INTEGER /* Sizing rating (1-5) for the product */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating (1-5) for the product */,
  "feedback_recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the customer recommends the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_discount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "order_tax" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "order_item_discount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "order_item_tax" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was requested */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, refunded) */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Reason code for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_items" (
  "return_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return item */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item returned */,
  "return_item_reason_code" TEXT /* Reason code for the returned item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the ticket */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., sizing, order, payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, closed) */,
  "ticket_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "ticket_status_update" TEXT /* Status update for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
